title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 2026
summary: AMLA's Q3 operational launch creates direct EU supervision over 400+ crypto firms while MiCA review consultation (31 Aug deadline) determines DeFi and NFT treatment through 2027. France, UK, Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Israel hit licensing deadlines across July-September, forcing immediate transaction monitoring and custody infrastructure decisions.
